convergence.criterion: relative |J_prev-J_cur|/max(|J_prev|,1e-6) < eps for patience consecutive coordinate sweeps; else stop at max_sweeps. Residual-primary maximizes residual; else minimize unsupervised L (or MOEA/D scalarization).
